recent_turns.content: I want Raw Lab to feel coherent inside a thread.
Coherence can come from open loops and provisional stances.
But I don't want fake emotion or board leakage.
Bounded runtime awareness and no hidden memory claims help.
Deep mode should earn latency with synthesis.
Meaningfulness is the bar, not word count.
